---
title: "Richard Mallock"
---

## Richard Mallock

**Dates:** (1843/4-1900)

### Description

of Cockington Court, Torquay, M. P. for Torquay 1886-1895.

### Biography

A picture of the memorial clock which stands in Torquay is at http://www.geograph.org.uk/photo/1446434

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 5 th 1900

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
